center.name: Fauro Island
center.summary: Fauro Island是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-capped myzomela，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Buka, Bougainville, the Shortland Islands, Fauro, Choiseul and Santa Isabel)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Buka, Bougainville, the Shortland Islands, Fauro, Choiseul and Santa Isabel)
